channel.title: SPL - High Point Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - High Point Branch

item.title: Where Does It Go? Practical tips for reducing waste in Seattle
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Lobby

Join us to learn how to reduce waste and save money.

Event details

item.title: Youth Drop-in Chess
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Youth Drop-in Chess for Children and Teens under 18 years of age. Come learn, practice and improve your chess playing skills.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Celebrate Poetry!
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Celebrate Poetry Month with us.

Event details

item.title: Resume Workshop for Teens
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Are you looking for a summer internship and/or job opportunity? Need some support in writing a resume? 

Event details

item.title: Reduced and Free Transit Fare Enrollment
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch

Low-income individuals and individuals with disabilities can receive a reduced-fare ORCA LIFT transit pass.Individuals receiving TANF, RCA, PWA, SSI, HEN, or ABD can receive a subsidized year-long pass.

Event details

item.title: Author Talk: Margaret S. Barrie discusses "Auntie M. Speaks"
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a discussion of the memoir of poetry and prose about Margaret’s childhood and beyond.

Event details

item.title: Teen Arts & Crafts: Comic-Making & Zines
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a drop-in art workshop for youth aged 12-17, exploring themes of identity, culture, and community.

Event details

item.title: Youth Drop-in Chess
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Youth Drop-in Chess for Children and Teens under 18 years of age. Come learn, practice and improve your chess playing skills.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details
